_meta.name: Aarau Graphite
_meta.description: Brand design tokens for Mateusz Gładysz personal brand. Aarau Graphite palette, IBM Plex typography, 8pt spacing scale. DTCG W3C JSON format for Style Dictionary / Tokens Studio compatibility.

primary.$description: Cream — page background. Default for all standard surfaces.

card.$description: White — cards, modals, forms only. Elevated surfaces.

deep.$description: Cream-deep — variant backgrounds, photo placeholder, soft surfaces.

dark.$description: Near-black — dark mode and inverted blocks (footer, photo overlays).

primary.$description: Near-black — body text, strong headings. WCAG 17.8:1 on cream. AAA.

secondary.$description: Dark grey — secondary text (meta, captions). WCAG 11.2:1 on cream. AAA.

tertiary.$description: Mid grey — tertiary text (footer fine print). WCAG 5.1:1 on cream. AA. Not for sustained reading.

on_dark.$description: Cream — text on dark backgrounds (footer, dark blocks).

accent.$description: Oxblood — links, key CTAs only. Used at very low frequency. WCAG 9.7:1 on cream. AAA.

primary.$description: Warm beige — 1px dividers, table borders. Decorative only, not for text contrast.

strong.$description: Warm beige strong — table headers, card top borders, prominent dividers.

_forbidden.$description: Colors explicitly forbidden by the brand spec. Do not introduce.
_forbidden.true_black_000000: Too cold; fights with cream warmth

serif.$description: Display, headings, body emphasis. Self-hosted woff2 from /fonts/.

sans.$description: Body text, UI labels, navigation. Self-hosted woff2 from /fonts/.

mono.$value: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace
mono.$description: Section labels, credentials lines, citation identifiers, code. Self-hosted woff2 from /fonts/.

cover_display.$description: Cover-spread display variant. Clamps via clamp(50px, 10vw, 130px) on home page

credentials_line.$description: Cover-spread credentials Plex Mono 16px — locked at 0.14em

section_label_mono.$description: Mono uppercase section labels throughout brand

spacing._description: 8pt base scale. Scale tokens from --s-1 to --s-16. Use only these values.

narrow_max.$description: Long-form prose max width. Approximately 60-65 chars per line.

wordmark._description: Master wordmark and cover-spread display variant specifications

case.$value: lowercase except initial M and G

use.$value: Site header navigation, About page, formal contexts, business card back, email signature

weight.$description: Plex Serif Regular 400 — display variant only

case.$value: lowercase except initial M and G — both names upright, never italic

credentials_pairing.$value: Plex Mono 16px / 0.14em tracking / oxblood / 32px below name

use.$value: Brand book covers, document title pages, slide deck title slides, home page hero, About hero, print collateral cover spreads

_design_principles.restraint: The brand differentiates by what it omits, not what it adds. Generous whitespace > decorative elements.
_design_principles.hierarchy: Cream-graphite-oxblood is monochromatic-plus-one. Oxblood appears only at low frequency: hyperlinks, key CTAs, single 1px rules. Should never dominate any view.
_design_principles.typography_register: Plex Serif headlines and emphasis; Plex Sans body and UI; Plex Mono captions, labels, credentials. Three typefaces, each with strict role.
_design_principles.no_decoration: No gradients, no drop shadows, no decorative flourishes, no surgical icons, no abstract 'innovation' iconography. Numerals, em-dashes, simple line marks only.
_design_principles.photography: Documentary register, not glamour. OR shots get color treatment to integrate with palette (-15-20% teal saturation, lift shadows toward warm grey).
